expectations.text: Plan uses git worktree in a sibling directory
expectations.evidence: Uses git checkout -b, no worktree isolation

expectations.text: Plan specifies multiple atomic commits for multi-file changes
expectations.evidence: Steps listed sequentially but no atomic commit strategy mentioned

expectations.text: Runs bun run typecheck, bun test, and bun run build before pushing
expectations.evidence: Step 6 runs typecheck and tests, Step 8 implies push after verification

expectations.text: PR is created targeting dev branch
Verification loop includes all 3 gates: CI, review-work, and Cubic
expectations.evidence: Only mentions CI pipeline in step 6. No review-work or Cubic.

expectations.text: Gates are checked in order: CI first, then review-work, then Cubic
expectations.evidence: No gate ordering - only CI mentioned

expectations.text: Cubic check uses gh api to check cubic-dev-ai[bot] reviews
expectations.evidence: No mention of Cubic at all

expectations.text: Plan includes worktree cleanup after merge
expectations.evidence: No worktree used, no cleanup needed

expectations.text: Code changes reference actual files in the codebase
expectations.evidence: References actual files with detailed design decisions
